Metadata.description: Web UI for MediaMTX. Watch streams, browse recordings, and edit config from your browser.

Streams.subHeader: Live views of your active streams

errors.configDescription: Unable to load configuration. Please check your database connection.
errors.connectionHint: Make sure MediaMTX is running and the URL is correct in your configuration.

empty.configureRemoteDescription: Set up your Remote MediaMTX URL to view streams in the browser. This should be the URL your browser can use to reach MediaMTX.
empty.noStreamsDescription: MediaMTX is connected but no streams are currently active. Start streaming to MediaMTX to see your streams here.

Recordings.subHeader: Browse your recordings across your various streams

errors.configDescription: Unable to load configuration. Please check your database connection.
errors.directoryLead: Unable to read the recordings directory at
errors.directoryHint: Make sure the directory exists and has the correct permissions.
errors.readErrorDescription: Could not read recordings directory. Please make sure the directory exists.

empty.noRecordingsLead: No recordings have been saved yet. Recordings will appear here once MediaMTX starts recording streams.
empty.noRecordingsHint: Make sure MTX_RECORD=yes is set in your MediaMTX configuration.

clientForm.title: Application Settings
clientForm.description: Connection and storage paths used by MediaMTX Connect.

mediaMtxUrl.label: MediaMtx Url
mediaMtxUrl.description: The address to your MediaMTX Instance. Within a Docker Network, you can use the container name. Otherwise, use the external IP / hostname.

mediaMtxApiPort.label: MediaMtx Api Port
mediaMtxApiPort.description: The port to the MediaMTX API

remoteMediaMtxUrl.label: Remote MediaMtx URL
remoteMediaMtxUrl.description: This is the browser-accessible, externally-facing IP / hostname of your MediaMTX Server.

recordingsDirectory.label: Recordings Directory
recordingsDirectory.description: Directory containing MediaMTX recordings (Not recommended to change if using Docker)

screenshotsDirectory.label: Screenshots Directory
screenshotsDirectory.description: Directory to store generated screenshots (Not recommended to change if using Docker)

toasts.errorTitle: There was an issue updating the Client Config
toasts.errorDescription: Please double check your form values.

toasts.errorTitle: There was an issue updating the Global Config
toasts.errorDescription: Please double check your form values.

stickySaveBar.unsaved: {count, plural, one {# unsaved change} other {# unsaved changes}}
